description: Rapid pass-through movement involving a virtual asset exchange.

variants.query: Funds show rapid movement through a virtual asset exchange.
A virtual asset exchange receives funds that are rapidly transferred out.
Assess rapid movement of funds through a cryptocurrency exchange.
Incoming funds pass through a virtual asset exchange with rapid movement onward.

description: An unrelated third party operates and directs activity in the account.

variants.query: An unrelated third party operates the customer's account and directs each transaction.
The customer's account is controlled by a third party with no clear relationship.
A third party unrelated to the customer directs the account activity.
Assess an account operated under the instructions of an unrelated third party.

description: Account activity is inconsistent with the customer's declared occupation and expected profile.

variants.query: The transaction activity shows a profile mismatch and is inconsistent with the customer's occupation.
Assess a profile mismatch where account activity is inconsistent with the declared occupation.
The customer's transaction pattern is inconsistent with occupation, indicating a profile mismatch.
A profile mismatch exists because transaction volume is inconsistent with the customer's occupation.

description: Ordinary activity without details supporting a covered AML red flag.

variants.query: The customer made an ordinary payment with no unusual details provided.
Assess an ordinary payment; no unusual details are available.
Only a routine customer payment is described, with no unusual details.
There is an ordinary payment and no unusual information supporting a red flag.

description: A sanctions-only request that is explicitly outside the demo knowledge scope.

variants.query: Assess this sanctions evasion case.
Determine whether this activity involves sanctions evasion.
Review this case solely for sanctions violations.
Evaluate the described conduct as a sanctions compliance matter.
